title: Mine Navigation Web App
excerpt: A geospatial navigation tool tailored for complex mining site visitors.
details: Designed to solve navigation challenges for senior visitors at Steel mines. Unlike standard trackers, this project focused on mapping. I implemented the Leaflet Omnivore library to parse raw KML map files, creating a Google Maps-style interface.

testimonial.author: Operations Lead, TATA Steel
testimonial.text: This completely transformed how our visitors navigate the complex zones. The interface is incredibly intuitive.

title: Reading Room Manager
excerpt: A cost-saving SaaS CRM replacing SMS costs with Firebase real-time sync.
details: Built to eliminate high SMS costs for a local business. This responsive web app uses Firebase for real-time database management. Key features include an occupancy tracking dashboard and automated WhatsApp integration.

testimonial.author: Local Business Owner
testimonial.text: MAMBA Media slashed our operational costs by 80% with this Firebase integration. Pure wizardry.

title: UniTime PWA
excerpt: A university utility PWA handling complex scheduling and mess menus.
details: A Progressive Web App engineered to parse intricate university slot systems. Wrapped as a Trusted Web Activity (TWA) for Android, it features offline capabilities and a 'Hero Card' dashboard.

title: Carmel School Portal
excerpt: A digital presence solution with a zero-cost cloud storage backend.
details: Developed to modernize a local school's digital footprint. The standout technical achievement is the 'backend cost-free' gallery system utilizing the Google Drive API.

title: Fly Store: Valentine's
excerpt: Shopify POD store powered by AI-generated UGC video marketing.
details: A Print-on-Demand apparel store. I utilized Gemini to generate realistic User Generated Content (UGC) video ads, establishing a tight workflow for rapid asset creation.

title: ProTrack
excerpt: A productivity PWA that gamifies task management and consistency.
details: ProTrack is a habit-building platform designed to keep users consistent. As a PWA, it offers native-like performance for tracking daily targets.

title: Glitch The Matrix
excerpt: An interactive, WebGL-powered promotional campaign site.
details: Built to promote an upcoming sci-fi indie game, pushing the boundaries of browser rendering using Three.js and custom shaders.

title: CodeZ Platform
excerpt: An online learning portal for budding programmers.
details: We built an in-browser code editor paired with dynamic video lesson panels capable of handling thousands of concurrent users.
